title: carex scabrella
intro: Carex scabrella, also known as the Rough Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex scabrella include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Carex scabrella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
